name: Qwen Coder Lite
description: Root ZIP preset focused on short HTML, CSS, and JavaScript help.
corpus: qwen coder lite answers short code questions without needing a server
small chromebook friendly coding help should keep dom updates simple and validate imports carefully
offline web apps should avoid remote assets and keep heavy work in a worker
a chat style app should own its scroll regions and avoid accidental horizontal overflow
root zip presets let the app load model files from the project root when fetch works

code: Here is the root ZIP coding preset speaking: keep the implementation scoped and local.
For code tasks here, prefer clear DOM ownership, no CDNs, and careful input validation.
css: CSS-wise, the biggest fix was giving the app shell stable scroll ownership and blocking horizontal overflow.
